name: test_vaccination_file_upload_creates_child_no_setting
description:
Test: Upload a vaccination file with no URN/care setting and verify the child
record is created and the location is set to school (MAV-855).
Steps:
1. Upload a vaccination file missing care setting for a child not in Mavis.
2. Navigate to children page and search for the child.
3. Open vaccination details for the child.
Verification:
- Vaccination location is displayed as the school.
Scenarios covered: MAV-855
descriptionHtml:
Test: Upload a vaccination file with no URN/care setting and verify the child
record is created and the location is set to school (MAV-855).
Steps:

  1. Upload a vaccination file missing care setting for a child not in Mavis.
  2. Navigate to children page and search for the child.
  3. Open vaccination details for the child.
    Verification:
  • Vaccination location is displayed as the school.
    Scenarios covered: MAV-855

Actual value: None

statusTrace:
setup_vaccs = '1679756'
schools = {'HPV': [School(name='Holbrook Academy', urn='137208', site=None), School(name='All Saints Academy Dunstable', urn='13...England (VA) Junior School", urn='142045', site=None), School(name='Egerton Primary School', urn='145981', site=None)]}
page = <Page url='https://qa.mavistesting.com/patients?q=SWIFT%2C+Steven&%5Bprogramme_types%5D%5B%5D=&programme_status_group=...ate_of_birth_month=&date_of_birth_year=&archived=0&missing_nhs_number=0&missing_nhs_number=1&aged_out_of_programmes=0'>
file_generator = <mavis.test.data.file_generator.FileGenerator object at 0x7f02c27955b0>
children = {'HPV': [Child(first_name='Steven', last_name='SWIFT', nhs_number='9015893934', address=('Flat 90', 'Ward Manor', 'Eas...t'), Parent(full_name='Ashleigh Ford', relationship=<Relationship.MUM: 'Mum'>, email_address='carol01@example.com')))]}

    @issue("MAV-855")
    @pytest.mark.vaccinations
    @pytest.mark.bug
    def test_vaccination_file_upload_creates_child_no_setting(
        setup_vaccs,
        schools,
        page,
        file_generator,
        children,
    ):
        """
        Test: Upload a vaccination file with no URN/care setting and verify the child
        record is created and the location is set to school (MAV-855).
        Steps:
        1. Upload a vaccination file missing care setting for a child not in Mavis.
        2. Navigate to children page and search for the child.
        3. Open vaccination details for the child.
        Verification:
        - Vaccination location is displayed as the school.
        Scenarios covered: MAV-855
        """
        child = children[Programme.HPV][0]
        school = schools[Programme.HPV][0]
    
        ImportRecordsWizardPage(page, file_generator).upload_and_verify_output(
            VaccsFileMapping.NO_CARE_SETTING
        )
        ImportsPage(page).header.click_mavis_header()
        DashboardPage(page).click_children()
    
        ChildrenSearchPage(page).search.click_advanced_filters()
        ChildrenSearchPage(page).search.check_children_aged_out_of_programmes()
        ChildrenSearchPage(page).search.search_for_child_name_with_all_filters(str(child))
>       ChildrenSearchPage(page).search.click_child(child)
